name: Bimpnackle

sheet.name: Bimpnackle
sheet.background_story:
Cursed with an incredibly foolish name, the hero known as Bimpnackle travels The Forsaken Lands in search of a deed that will bring enough honor and renown that people no longer laugh when he introduces himself.

So far he has not succeeded.

After the devastation of The Church of Her, Bimpnackle turned to the light of Agora and had his eyes seared by its divinity.
